description: JGA Enterprise OS default policy rules — enforces SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md and SECTIONAL_LAWS.md

policies.description: Project cannot transition to active status without a signed contract.
policies.denyRationale: GATE-01 BLOCKED: Project cannot become active without a signed contract. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. IV §2; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 2.2)

policies.description: Production work cannot begin before a deposit is confirmed.
policies.denyRationale: GATE-02 BLOCKED: Production cannot begin before deposit is confirmed. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. IV §1; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 2.1)

policies.description: Final deliverables cannot be released before final payment is cleared.
policies.denyRationale: GATE-03 BLOCKED: Final delivery is blocked until final payment is cleared. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. IV §3; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 2.3)

policies.description: Outbound business calls require a valid compliance artifact.
policies.denyRationale: GATE-04 BLOCKED: Outbound business workflow requires a valid compliance artifact. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. II Law 6; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 5.1)

policies.description: State BRIC activation requires Owner + Compliance Agent dual-auth.
policies.denyRationale: GATE-05 BLOCKED: State BRIC activation requires Owner role and Compliance Agent approval. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. II Law 5; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 5.1)

policies.description: Contractor may only access their assigned state BRIC.
policies.denyRationale: GATE-06 BLOCKED: Contractor may only access their assigned State BRIC. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. V; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 3.2)

policies.description: Pricing quotes must originate from the backend pricing engine.
policies.denyRationale: GATE-07 BLOCKED: Pricing quote did not originate from the pricing engine. Hardcoded prices are not permitted. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. IV §4; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 2.4)

policies.description: Audit log writes must be append-only (no UPDATE or DELETE).
policies.denyRationale: GATE-08 BLOCKED: Audit log is append-only. UPDATE and DELETE operations are unconstitutional. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. VI §2; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 2.5)
BLOCKED: Contractors may not edit pricing. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. V §1; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 3.2)

policies.description: Contractors may not edit contract terms.
policies.denyRationale: BLOCKED: Contractors may not edit contract terms. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. V §1; SECTIONAL_LAWS.md § 3.2)

policies.description: Contractors may not edit payout rules.
policies.denyRationale: BLOCKED: Contractors may not edit payout rules. (SYSTEM_CONSTITUTION.md Art. V §1)
